text:
素敵だわ……
食べちゃうのがもったいないくらいね。
きっと武器にもなるんでしょう？

それでも私に譲ってくれるなんて
<%me>さん！
あなたって、なんていい人なの？

<%me>さんの
善意を絶対に無駄にしないわ。

みんなをアッと言わせるような
究極の料理を作ってみせる！

Oh my goodness. This is almost too perfect to
eat. Look at it, I bet it'd make a good weapon
too!

And you're still fine with giving it to me?
I wish everyone in the world were like you,
<%me>!

Well, I won't let your kindness go to waste,
<%me>!

Just wait. I'll make this into the ultimate
dish, so fine you'll never want anything else
again!

Thanks so much for your help,
<%me>!
